creator: heinrich.adam@iml.unibe.ch
text:
If I download the 11.0 Release (FreeBSD-11.0-RELEASE-amd64-dvd1.iso) and I open the ISO on a Macintosh the Text Files are full of hex zeros.
If I download the 10.3 Release (FreeBSD-10.3-RELEASE-amd64-dvd1.iso) and I open the ISO on a Macintosh the Text Files are ok.

the 10.3 Release I can install on a ASUS Platform without any problem.
the 10.3 Release I can't install on the same ASUS platform.
